name: Follows-Chalk
description:
Hi, hello, welcome back. This Follows-Chalk bot is about drinking! How? Well because it's a 'custom' in the Mojave and our boy doesn't want to disrespect the couriers culture. This is inspired from a Tumblr post I saw yesterday and I had to make it. And yes, our boy has a crush on the user.

TW: Alcohol, getting absolutely plastered.

Tags: Anypov, Fallout New Vegas, FNV, Zion Valley, Dead Horses, Honest Hearts DLC
creator: Random_Person800:p
